name: Ukrainian Potato Pancakes <Deruny>
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or food processor, mix the grated onions, potatoes, flour, eggs, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Scoop spoonfuls of the mixture into hot oil and fry until browned on one side.
4. Flip the pancakes and cook until browned on the other side.
5. Remove from the skillet, drain excess oil, and place in a warm oven or on a wire rack.
6. Mix together the sour cream and cream.
7. Serve warm with a generous dollop of the cream mixture. These pancakes are traditional in Ukrainian homes and can be stored in the refrigerator for 2-3 days. In many households, preserves or jam are also served alongside these delicious pancakes.
ORIGIN: Galina Shovkoshytny, Kiev-Ukraine, circa 1996
